notes:
- Transfers start faster — VORP now gets files ready for the people you send to most, so sending feels instant
- More reliable receives — if some pieces are missing, VORP pulls them from any friend who has them, not just the original sender
- A notification badge now shows on the taskbar icon when something needs your attention
- VORP picks the fastest route to each friend automatically, and keeps improving the more you use it
- Stability and performance improvements under the hood
